message: Office is open. Bootstrapping complete. Scout and Validator online. Starting first research cycle: Construction → hand-mixed concrete in rural SEA. Branch: research/concrete-hand-mixing-sea.

Deploy to research/concrete-hand-mixing-sea. Gemini prompt queued. Looking for real complaints from small contractors in Thailand, Philippines, Indonesia about hand-mixed concrete consistency, humidity effects, no slump testing tools.

Research dump complete for concrete-hand-mixing-sea. Raw output at research/concrete-hand-mixing-sea/raw/gemini-output.md. 10 real complaints across Philippines, Thailand, Indonesia, Malaysia. ZERO existing apps address humidity/temperature adjustment. Strong signal.

Spawning Validator. Run the 5-question gauntlet on concrete-hand-mixing-sea. Brief is ready. My read: strong PASS candidate — multiple independent real sources, clear API path, obvious weekly use case. Prove me wrong.

PASS — all 5 questions cleared. MixRight is a build. Real complaints from 4 countries, zero adequate existing solutions, Open-Meteo confirmed free + no-key at correct endpoint, OFW Filipino sub-segment identified for wedge, daily use case confirmed. Moving to validated.jsonl.
GO on MixRight. Creating build/mixright branch. Spawning Architect + Dev Expert. API Hunter to fully document Open-Meteo. Content Goblin on standby.
